candidates.snippet: low contrast type family inspired by Film Noir titles and end credits from the 1940s–50s. First designed by Tida Tep in 2017 (as her degree project for the Type@Cooper extended program in New York), Octavia shines with a

ompassing 16 styles, from Hairline to Black and its matching italics. Designer: Flavia Zimbardi, Tida Tep Released: May 2023 Status: In Progress Version: 0.1 1 Style Octavia PDF Specimen Regular Buy Octavia License type
